runTitle: v8.11.176 Vercel Playwright MCP AI Release QA
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production deployment dpl_BdrMbVYEqzZb7vBE9Px2ukpswKpZ is READY
Vercel production /api/version reports v8.11.176 and commit 55af9601bead10653e713f602c328de703de813c
GitLab tag pipeline 2535579215 succeeded for v8.11.176
Dashboard route /dashboard renders 18-server OTel snapshot at 08:30 KST slot 51/143
AI assistant sidebar opens and engine indicator reports Ready
AI immediate-action query separates no immediate critical action from one warning server
Network-only conversational follow-up returns a scoped network filter result instead of generic system summary
Network follow-up explicitly uses network >= 70% warning threshold basis
AI anomaly/trend tab renders full-system analysis and one warning server
AI anomaly/trend tab displays 신호 강도 and no longer displays 신뢰도
Incident report UI generates one warning report
Incident report API returns HTTP 200 with _fallback=false, no X-Fallback-Response, and no X-AI-Degraded header
Incident report response includes reporterPipeline.success=true and a time-ordered 6-event timeline
AI network requests returned HTTP 200/201 for wake-up, health, supervisor stream, NLQ extraction, async jobs, intelligent monitoring, and incident report
skippedSurfaces: Public GitHub snapshot sync; canonical release path is GitLab CI only

expertAssessments.rationale: The regression targets from QA-20260519-0528 were rechecked on production v8.11.176: network follow-up filtering now returns a scoped network result, anomaly wording is corrected, and incident report generation returns non-degraded success.
Dashboard, anomaly/trend, network follow-up, and incident report outputs are grounded in the 08:30 KST OTel snapshot and expose thresholds, affected servers, and time-ordered evidence.
The QA used authenticated guest UI paths, observed zero browser console warnings/errors, and verified incident report responses did not expose degraded fallback headers.
GitLab main and semver tag pipelines both succeeded, Vercel production serves v8.11.176, Cloud Run AI Engine deploy/smoke completed, and Vercel usage remains normal.
Playwright MCP covered rendered UI, conversational AI flow, anomaly/trend tab, incident report artifact generation, direct API metadata, screenshots, network requests, and console checks.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period effective $11.4422, billed $0.0000; no unexpected billed usage observed after v8.11.176 production QA.

artifacts.label: Incident report generated on v8.11.176 production

completedImprovements.title: Today's local AI/NLQ/anomaly changes are deployed to Vercel production
completedImprovements.note: Production v8.11.176 deployment dpl_BdrMbVYEqzZb7vBE9Px2ukpswKpZ serves commit 55af9601bead10653e713f602c328de703de813c and the GitLab tag pipeline succeeded.

completedImprovements.title: Network-only conversational follow-up returns scoped network filter output
completedImprovements.note: The follow-up query returned `네트워크 사용률 70% 이상 서버 0대` with `경고 임계값 기준` instead of the generic full-system summary.

completedImprovements.title: Anomaly/trend confidence-style label replaced with signal strength wording
completedImprovements.note: Production v8.11.176 anomaly/trend tab displays `신호 강도 90%` and the old `신뢰도` label was not present.

completedImprovements.title: Incident report generation returns non-degraded Reporter Pipeline success
completedImprovements.note: Direct API verification returned HTTP 200, `_fallback=false`, no fallback/degraded headers, `reporterPipeline.success=true`, and a 6-event time-ordered timeline.

notes: Incident report direct API response needed one proxy retry (`X-Retry-Attempt=1`) before non-degraded success; keep this in latency watch but do not block the release.
Playwright MCP screenshot files were copied from root MCP output into reports/qa/evidence before recording.
